mapper.select: SELECT c.svc_id FROM tb_prchs_pass a JOIN tb_goods b ON a.goods_id = b.goods_id JOIN tb_map_goods_svc_id c ON a.goods_id = c.goods_id WHERE a.member_no = #{memberNo} AND c.category_type1 = #{playType} AND a.tmbrship_apply_yn = c.tmbrship_apply_yn AND a.goods_status = 'INUSE'

SELECT c.svc_id FROM tb_prchs_pass a JOIN tb_goods b ON a.goods_id = b.goods_id JOIN tb_map_goods_svc_id c ON a.goods_id = c.goods_id WHERE a.prchs_id = #{prchsId} AND c.category_type1 = #{playType} AND a.tmbrship_apply_yn = c.tmbrship_apply_yn
